title: AI System Record
description: Defines the metadata, classification, ownership, and deployment state of an AI system under governance.

id.description: Unique identifier of the AI system (e.g. sys_1234).

title.description: Name or title of the AI system.

description.description: Detailed description of the AI system's purpose and functionality.

owner.description: Department, team, or individual responsible for the system.

classification_tier.description: Criticality or risk tier of the AI system under operational policy.

model_details.description: Technical specs of the primary model backing the system.

datasets.description: List of primary training, validation, or inference dataset references.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the AI system.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the record was initialized.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the record was last modified.

metadata.description: Custom key-value pairs for metadata extensions.
